fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the routing header.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an additional description for the routing if there is not enough space in the Description field.
You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.
With a description, it is easier to recognize the function of a specific routing.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the routing card was last modified.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this routing.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Routing, and then click Comments. A window appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox. Notes follow documents when they are posted in the same way as comments.
The program automatically returns the entry to the Comment field if there is an entry in the Comments window.
You cannot edit or delete the contents of this field.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of this routing.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies in which order operations in the routing are performed.

fields.name: Version Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series you want to use to create a new version of this routing.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign the routing number.
